title: echinocactus intortus
intro: Echinocactus intortus, also known as the 'Old Lady Cactus', is a species of cactus that belongs to the Echinocactus genus and is native to Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Echinocactus intortus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Echinocactus intortus can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing and well-being.
